hardening.comment: L-LTP pathway hardening. Ref: Kandel, Science 294:1030-1038 (2001)
hardening.bio_mechanism: cAMP/PKA/CREB cascade -> protein synthesis -> structural spine enlargement

forgetting.comment: Performance-driven LTD (PRIMARY) + Time-based decay (secondary). Primary ref: Bienenstock J Neurosci (1982); Secondary: Dudek & Bear, PNAS 89(10):4363-4367 (1992)
forgetting.note: Pruning is PRIMARILY driven by consecutive wrong answers in the wrong region. Time decay is a gentle background process (30-day half-life).

shortcuts.comment: Metaplasticity-based fast paths. Ref: Abraham & Bear, TINS 19(4):126-130 (1996)
shortcuts.bio_mechanism: Prior high-freq activity lowers LTP induction threshold (metaplasticity)

tagging_capture.comment: Synaptic Tagging & Capture. Ref: Frey & Morris, Nature 385:533-536 (1997)
tagging_capture.bio_mechanism: Strong synapse generates PRP pool; weak tagged synapses capture PRPs -> associative strengthening

clustered_plasticity.comment: Clustered Plasticity. Ref: Fu et al., Nature 483:92-96 (2012)
clustered_plasticity.bio_mechanism: Nearby synapses on same dendritic branch share PRPs; co-active neighbors get boosted

eligibility_trace.comment: Eligibility Traces. Ref: Gerstner et al., Nat Neurosci 21:1273-1283 (2018)
eligibility_trace.bio_mechanism: Synapse tagged by success (eligibility trace); second success within window converts tag to permanent LTP

neuromodulation.comment: Volume Transmission / Neuromodulation. Ref: Fuxe et al., Prog Neurobiol 83:263-287 (2007)
neuromodulation.bio_mechanism: DA = reward prediction error (global); 5-HT = patience/serendipity (slow modulation)

astrocyte.comment: Astrocyte Ca2+ modulation. Ref: Perea & Araque, Science 317:1083-1086 (2007); Haydon & Carmignoto, Physiol Rev 86:1009-1031 (2006)
astrocyte.bio_mechanism: Astrocytes sense regional activity -> release gliotransmitters -> globally modulate all synapses in region

criticality.comment: Neuronal Avalanches / Criticality. Ref: Beggs & Plenz, J Neurosci 23(35):11167-11177 (2003)
criticality.bio_mechanism: Branching ratio sigma ~ 1 at critical point; system auto-tunes pruning/hardening to stay critical
